subject: Fletchinder, a bird Pokemon resembling a swallow with a red forehead and dark feathers, shown in high-speed flight amid flames and embers
description: A streamlined bird with dark feathers and a vivid reddish marking swoops through a blazing, ember-filled sky. Wings are spread wide in full flight, motion conveyed by streaking fire and glowing embers around it. The background is a wall of flame and hot light. The palette is dominated by warm oranges, reds, and dark browns with flashes of gold-yellow from the fire.
foreground: dark-feathered bird in flight through fire and embers
background: wall of flame and embers, blazing sky
